name: Parmesan Pepper Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Unroll the dough and cut into 8 strips.
3. Twist each strip and brush with beaten egg.
4. Place the twists on an ungreased cookie sheet about 1 inch apart.
5. In a small bowl, combine Parmesan cheese and black pepper.
6. Sprinkle the mixture over the sticks.
7. Bake for 15 to 18 minutes or until golden brown.
